summary: The diff implements all four requirements (REQ-19 through REQ-22) with good coverage. The /wallet route is added to App.tsx, WalletPage.tsx is created, backend/main.mo includes the Transaction type and wallet functions, and useQueries.ts includes the wallet hooks. However, there are notable additions beyond the spec including an addTransaction mutation, a modal flow, and a migration file.

hallucinated_features.description: addTransaction backend function and useAddTransaction React Query mutation hook
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-21 only specifies getWalletBalance() and getTransactions() as the two functions to expose. REQ-22 only asks for fetching balance and transactions. The spec explicitly states that actual Add Money/Withdraw payment flows are out of scope. Adding a writable addTransaction function and wiring it to a modal form goes beyond what was requested.

hallucinated_features.description: ActionModal component for entering amounts on Add Money/Withdraw
hallucinated_features.reason: The spec says buttons may be present but functional payment processing is out of scope (Non-goals). A fully functional modal form that submits amounts and descriptions to the backend exceeds the stated scope.
No migration file was requested in any of the requirements. This is an additional file not specified in the build request.
